rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions in component type scopes when referring to component ports, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for all AGREE contracts.
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types (bool, int, real).
Do not assume numeric bounds unless explicitly stated in the requirement.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless model exposes typed ports or constants.
Generate only Boolean expressions for Boolean ports; omit unsafe clauses for opaque data.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value for range comparisons.
Ensure AGREE annex blocks are placed in valid AADL component type or implementation scopes.
anti_patterns: Do not create x >= 0 assumptions without explicit requirement support.
Do not reference AADL property names like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables.
